who: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll reports/month
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll reports/month, inefficient payroll report generation causes delays in employee payments. We streamline report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient payroll report generation leading to delays in processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll workflows
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Community forums where HR managers share tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation and email delivery
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
